page_content: AMSC764 Advanced Numerical Optimization (3 Credits) Modern numerical methods for solving unconstrained and constrained nonlinear optimization problems in ﬁnite dimensions. Design of computational algorithms and the analysis of their properties. Prerequisite: MATH410; or permission of instructor. Cross-listed with C MSC764. Credit Only Granted for: AMSC607, AMSC764 or CMSC764. F ormerly: AMSC607.
